name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Tōshō Daigongen (Tokugawa Ieyasu) Zō Ippuku Tsuketari Mokuzō Kuro-urushi-nuri Uchibako oyobi Sotobako Nikō

description_en: A color-on-silk hanging scroll portrait of Tosho Daigongen (Tokugawa Ieyasu), accompanied by a black-lacquered wooden inner box and outer box. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Yotsugi, Katsushika Ward.

description_en: A colored painting on a wooden panel depicting the raid of the Ako ronin, one panel. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Mokuzō Shōtoku Taishi Ryūzō Ikku Tsuketari Mokuzō Butsugyō Ryūzō Ikku

description_en: A wooden standing statue of Prince Shotoku (one figure), accompanied by a wooden standing statue in Buddha form (one figure). It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Yotsugi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Temple bell (Bell of Matsura), one bell
description_en: A temple bell known as the Bell of Matsura, one bell. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Accompanying letter of Asano Nagayoshi, one item
description_en: An accompanying letter of Asano Nagayoshi, one item. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.

description_en: A set of three documents of the Suzuki family. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward, located in Katsushika Ward.

description_en: A pair of Koshin stone lanterns of Fugenji Temple. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Horikiri, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Itae Chakushoku Taka Hakuchō o Toraeru Zu Ichimen
name_en: Colored panel painting of a hawk catching a swan, one panel
description_en: A colored painting on a wooden panel depicting a hawk catching a swan, one panel. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Yotsugi, Katsushika Ward.

description_en: A wooden standing statue of Yakushi Nyorai (the Medicine Buddha), one figure. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Okudo, Katsushika Ward.

It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is kept at the Museum of Local History and Astronomy, Shiratori 3-25-1, Katsushika Ward, and elsewhere.
